awards: Nominated for 1 Oscar. 2 wins & 8 nominations total
writer: Isaac Asimov, Robert Silverberg, Nicholas Kazan
actors: Robin Williams, Embeth Davidtz, Sam Neill
plot: This film follows the 'life' and times of the lead character, an android who is purchased as a household robot programmed to perform menial tasks. Within a few days the Martin family realizes that they don't have an ordinary droid as Andrew begins to experience emotions and creative thought. In a story that spans two centuries, Andrew learns the intricacies of humanity while trying to stop those who created him from destroying him.
